allow: Bash(dotnet ef migrations add InitialCreate --project src/Infrastructure --startup-project src/ConsoleApp --output-dir Data/Migrations)
Bash(dotnet ef database update --project src/Infrastructure --startup-project src/ConsoleApp)
Bash(sqlcmd -S "\(localdb\)\\MSSQLLocalDB" -d OnlineShoppingDb -Q "SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES ORDER BY TABLE_NAME;")
Bash(sqlcmd -S "\(localdb\)\\MSSQLLocalDB" -d OnlineShoppingDb -Q "SELECT Id, UserName, Role FROM Users; SELECT Id, Name, Price, Stock, Category FROM Products;")
Bash(sqlcmd -S "\(localdb\)\\MSSQLLocalDB" -d OnlineShoppingDb -Q "DELETE FROM Products; DELETE FROM Users;")
Bash(sqlcmd -S "\(localdb\)\\MSSQLLocalDB" -d OnlineShoppingDb -Q "SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON; DELETE FROM Products; DELETE FROM Users;")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Service -Name ''MSSQL*'' 2>$null | Select-Object Name, Status, DisplayName | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Service -Name ''MSSQL*'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Status, DisplayName | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(sqlcmd -S . -d OnlineShoppingDb -Q "SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_TYPE=''BASE TABLE'' ORDER BY TABLE_NAME;")

Bash(docker exec SQL_Server_Docker /opt/mssql-tools18/bin/sqlcmd -S localhost -U sa -P "@123Shesha" -C -d OnlineShoppingDb -Q "SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_TYPE=''BASE TABLE'' ORDER BY TABLE_NAME;")
Bash(sqlcmd -S localhost,1433 -U sa -P "@123Shesha" -C -d OnlineShoppingDb -Q "SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_TYPE=''BASE TABLE'' ORDER BY TABLE_NAME;")

Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Service -Name ''MSSQLSERVER'' -Force; Set-Service -Name ''MSSQLSERVER'' -StartupType Disabled; Get-Service -Name ''MSSQLSERVER'' | Select-Object Name, Status, StartType")
